◆

Design System Inspired by BrandBuildr

P1 harness — dark shell · light content (default) · indigo accent

Static preview: every YAML color, type, rounded, spacing, and component token from DESIGN.md (aligned with the React app).

button-primary button-secondary
01 / Colors

Semantic palette (YAML)

Neutrals, shell/content split, indigo CTA, phase lifecycle, consensus teal, destructive.

Text & surfaces
text-primary
#0F172A
text-muted
#64748B
page-bg
#F8FAFC
card-bg
#FFFFFF
border-default
#E2E8F0
border-muted
#F1F5F9
Shell & main column theme
shell-bg
#020617
content-bg-light
#F8FAFC
content-text-light
#0F172A
content-bg-dark
#020617
content-text-dark
#E2E8F0
Accent & buttons
accent-indigo
#6366F1
button-primary-bg / hover
#4F46E5
Aa
on-primary
#FFFFFF
Phase (canonical) · consensus
phase-core
#10B981
phase-grow
#0EA5E9
phase-scale
#6366F1
phase-legacy
#8B5CF6
consensus-teal
#14B8A6

destructive-red
#DC2626
on
on-destructive
#FFFFFF
dark-slate / dark-canvas

dark-slate-text

02 / Typography

Inter · JetBrains Mono · Georgia (export)

Page title (h1)
h1 — 24px / 600 / 1.3 / -0.01em / Inter
Section heading (h2)
h2 — 18px / 600 / 1.4
Card title (h3)
h3 — 15px / 600 / 1.4
Body (body-md) for main column copy.
body-md — 14px / 400 / 1.6
Body small — breadcrumbs, metadata (body-sm).
body-sm — 13px / 400 / 1.5 / text-muted
Section label
section-label — 11px / 500 / 0.08em / uppercase
Optional subtitle under H1 (4px gap in product)
subtitle — 14px / 400 / 1.5
STAGE_03 · DISCOVER
mono-label — 12px / 700 / 1.2 / JetBrains Mono
Full Strategy Export title
export-serif-h1 — 32px / 600 / 1.2 / -0.02em / Georgia (export only)
03 / Buttons

button-primary · secondary · destructive

All use rounded.md (8px), padding: 12px in YAML. Primary uses button-primary-bg #4F46E5; hover target accent-indigo-hover #4F46E5 (indigo-600).

Primary
button-primary
Secondary
button-secondary (outlined border)
button-destructive

Also: button-secondary-outlined (transparent, text text-primary) — same as secondary row above. Destructive only for delete / irreversible.

04 / Shell & layout

shell-sidebar · shell-content-light

P1: dark persistent sidebars shell-bg #020617, border #1E293B. Main column default: content-bg-light + content-text-light. Optional dark content mode uses content-bg-dark / content-text-dark.

Sidebar
Active (indigo)
Main Outlet — max-width 1200px · px-12 on key pages. ThemeProvider toggles light/dark content.
05 / Component patterns (YAML)

Stage · consensus · chat · pillars · modals

Visual stand-ins; behaviour in SYS-UI-0.1. Tokens reference components.* in DESIGN.md frontmatter.

stage-indicator-bar
Discover → Diagnose…
NAV_04
background #0F172A · border #1E293B · activeAccent accent-indigo
board-consensus-panel (consensus-teal)
Board consensus

Decide-phase chrome — accent from YAML.

facilitator-message (accent indigo)
Facilitator line — accentColor: accent-indigo, body-md.
session-pillar-sidebar
Pillars
activePillarDot · accent-indigo
context-menu · modal-confirmation · filter-bar

context-menu: card-bg + rounded.md · modal-confirmation: card-bg + rounded.lg (12px) · filter-bar: transparent · padding: 0 (flat row)

Context action Modal surface (lg)

table-row: padding 12px · brand-card / brand-avatar / PhaseBadge — see cards section.

06 / brand-card · phase-pill · shapes

brand-card, PhaseBadge, shape system

Phase pills: rounded.full, section-label type. Shapes: square / circle / triangle = strategy / initiative / task, stroke in phase colour.

Core

Brand name

brand-card · brand-avatar 32px · rounded.sm

Add brand

Same border weight

No dashed “secondary” style.

Core Grow Scale Legacy

Shapes (phase stroke)

Square · strategy
Circle · initiative
Triangle · task (scale)
07 / Forms & breadcrumb

Inputs · table-row padding · breadcrumb

Breadcrumb: typography.body-sm + text-muted · table-row: padding 12px in YAML.

Operate / Strategy model / Initiative name

08 / Spacing

Spacing scale (YAML)

4
xs
8
sm
16
md
24
lg · title
32
xl · top
48
xxl · side

Also: subtitle-gap 4px · page-top 32 · title-to-content 24 · content-max-width 1200px

09 / Rounded

rounded.* (YAML)

0 none

4 sm

32 avatar sm

8 md

12 lg

16 xl

9999 full

10 / Elevation & depth

Tonal cards · overlays

Light content: page vs card + borders; shadow-sm in implementation where needed. Overlays: modals / slide-over shadow-2xl class in app. Below: illustrative only.

Tonal
#F8FAFC vs #FFF
sm
subtle
md
menus
2xl (app)
panels
Generated from BrandBuildr DESIGN.md — awesome-design-md
